channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog mess, 24th May
item.description:
Dog mess from dog owned by 8 Reminder lane. Younger girl and adult Akita at 6pm ish kids were also playing in the park so run risk of playin in it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olympian Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This Mercedes continues to park here, 24th May
item.description:
And without you giving him a ticket

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 24th May
item.description:
Someone tagged brick on the overground support. Yuckkie.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, O'Meara Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in stairwell fire exit Edgecombe hiuse, 24th May
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent: Multiple high-pressure commercial gas cylinders abandoned on pavement, 24th May
item.description:
There are multiple large, commercial-grade industrial gas cylinders fly-tipped directly on the pavement causing a trip hazard. I’m also concerned about safety in the current heatwave. Please can they be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upper Clapton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 24th May
item.description:
Dumped chairs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Green Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the grey box, 24th May
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowside, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping pile, 24th May
item.description:
More and more rubbish is being fly tipped here. It happens regularly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silbury Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign damaged with graffiti, 24th May
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowside, Eltham

item.title: Dumped furniture, 24th May
item.description:
Dumped furniture under the “no flight tipping” sign

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Green Road, Eltham

item.title: Abandoned supermarket trolley, 24th May
item.description:
Abandoned supermarket trolley, can't have been there that long or I think I would have seen it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lockesley Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and abandoned trollies, 24th May
item.description:
Junction HGL and Campshill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bicycle tires dumped on pavement, 24th May
item.description:
As described above can council attend and remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goddard Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement spillage down a entire street and drain, 24th May
item.description:
There is a large amount of builders waste. It looks to be cement that has spilled down the entire street from 59 Vanbrugh hill to Walnut tree road. It is going down the drain. Potential environmental hazard. It seems to be building up on parked car tires and getting worse with rainfall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: For sale signs, 24th May
item.description:
Resident has multiple for sale signs on the property This is not allowed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collindale Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 303 Kilburn Lane, 24th May
item.description:
Graffiti that is offensive and bold in purple.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead baby fox, 24th May
item.description:
Dead baby fox cub outside 65 Stone Park Avenue - on grass near bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of toys, pram and rubbish, 24th May
item.description:
Bunch of large toys, kids stuff, pet pram and other items dumped in the private front courtyard of flats 45-55

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45-55, Crawthew Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Peabody Housing continue to neglect rubbish, 24th May
item.description:
This is a Peabody house. It has a warden and they continue to fail to look after their rubbish. It attracts rats and foxes. This has been going on for many months. Have reported it to Peabody - no change.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - plates and lantern twisted, 24th May
item.description:
P1198
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walpole Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
